title: lycium salsum var. typicum
intro: Lycium salsum var. typicum, also known as the Saltbush or Goji, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lycium salsum var. typicum include its potential to improve vision, boost immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried or processed into capsules, tablets, or teas for consumption, and is also used in skincare products due to its antioxidant and anti-aging properties.
